1000636872.english: The party preparations are done, so Hachiko came to call you…
1000636872.korean: 파티 준비 다 돼서 하치코, 언니 부르러 왔는데...

1000636874.english: You look especially cute today~ So pretty~

1000636875.english: Ugh… Lilith-Big Sis, hugging me suddenly makes it hard to breathe…
1000636875.korean: 으붑... 리리스 언니, 갑자기 안으면 숨막혀요...

1000636876.english: Hoho, sorry. I just really wanted to hug you all of a sudden.
1000636876.korean: 호호, 미안해. 갑자기 꼭 안아주고 싶어서.

1000636878.english: …It's a bit different from what I expected?

1000636880.english: Hehe, two of you coming to call Big Sis because the party preparations are done… this Big Sis is so happy~
1000636880.korean: 후후, 파티 준비가 됐다고 언니를 부르러 두 명이나 오다니, 이 언니는 너무 기뻐요~

1000636882.english: …Lilith-Big Sis, something seems a little off…

1000636883.english: But Big Sis needs to talk a little more with Master, you see~?
1000636883.korean: 그런데 언니는 주인님이랑 조금 더 이야기를 나눠야 하거든~?

1000636884.english: So go ahead and go first. Ah, that's right.
1000636884.korean: 그러니까 먼저 가도록 하렴. 아, 그렇지.

1000636885.english: Hachiko, today you can specially eat two meat pies.
1000636885.korean: 하치코, 오늘은 특별히 미트 파이 두 개 먹어도 된단다.

1000636888.english: And Poi… ah, right. Shall we swap this week's escort duty with Big Sis?
1000636888.korean: 그리고 포이는... 아, 그렇지. 이번주 호위 당번 언니랑 바꿔줄까?

1000636890.english: Hehe, the world is such a beautiful place… Oh my, Master is calling.
1000636890.korean: 후후, 세상은 이렇게 아름다운 곳이었구나... 어머, 주인님이 부르시네.

1000636891.english: Then see you later, my pretty little ones.

1000636893.english: Hehe, I didn't expect Big Sis to allow me to eat two meat pies!
1000636893.korean: 헤헤, 언니가 미트파이 두 개 먹는 거 허락해 줄 줄은 몰랐어요!

1000636894.english: Exactly. I didn't expect Poi to see that side either.
1000636894.korean: 그러게. 포이도 저런 모습을 보게될 줄은 몰랐어.

1000636895.english: Well… anyway, it seems to have worked out. Poi can also play sticky~ with Master now.
1000636895.korean: 뭐... 어쨌든 잘 된 것 같으니까. 포이도 주인님이랑 끈적~하게 놀 수 있게 됐고 말이야.

1000636899.english: Goodbye. Are the simulation preparations done?

1000636903.english: Yeah, nice to see you too.

1000636904.english: I hear it often, so I understand this is a greeting.
1000636904.korean: 자주 들으니까 이게 인삿말인 건 알겠더라고.

1000636906.english: But if it's recovered, doesn't that mean the data already exists?
1000636906.korean: 그런데 복구했으면 데이터는 이미 있는 거 아냐?

1000636920.english: Let's call it a day for today's training. Everyone, rest.
1000636920.korean: 일단 오늘 훈련은 여기까지 하자. 다들 쉬어.

1000636924.english: Even during escort duty, your personality shows…

1000636926.english: …Still, suddenly licking ears is something I'll have to correct, even if I scold you.
1000636926.korean: ...그래도 갑자기 귀를 핥는 건 혼을 내서라도 고쳐야겠군.

1000636929.english: Can we talk for a moment?

1000636931.english: Can you tell me the reason?

1000636932.english: Yeah. I believe that's never the case.
1000636932.korean: 응. 그런 건 절대 아니라고 믿어.

1000636937.english: Do you think I don't know?

1000636938.english: I know everything that happened between Lilith, Sowan, and Lise.
1000636938.korean: 리리스랑 소완, 리제 사이에 있었던 일은 전부 알고 있어.

1000636939.english: And what happened with the other members too. Lately, it seems a bit restrained.
1000636939.korean: 그리고 다른 대원들이랑 있었던 일도. 요즘엔 좀 자제하는 것 같지만.

1000636940.english: And I know everything about the personality of the Black Lilith model, without missing a thing.
1000636940.korean: 그리고 블랙 리리스 기종의 성향도, 하나도 빠짐없이 다 알고 있어.

1000636941.english: But… the Black Lilith in the records and our Lilith seem a little different.
1000636941.korean: 그런데... 기록 속의 블랙 리리스랑 우리 리리스는 조금 다른 것 같더라고.

1000636942.english: I know how much Lilith is trying for me.
1000636942.korean: 리리스가 날 위해 얼마나 노력하고 있는지 잘 알고 있어.

1000636943.english: Don't worry. I like you just the way you are, Lilith.
1000636943.korean: 걱정하지 마. 나는 있는 그대로의 리리스를 좋아해.

1000636944.english: I hope Lilith likes me as I am too.
1000636944.korean: 리리스도 있는 그대로 나를 좋아해줬으면 좋겠어.

1000636945.english: Do you remember the day we first met?

1000636950.english: Tomorrow's training, we'll do well, right?
1000636950.korean: 내일 훈련, 잘 할 수 있겠지.

1000636952.english: Lilith is Lilith. She doesn't need to be good, and she doesn't need to hide her bad side.
1000636952.korean: 리리스는 리리스야. 착해질 필요도, 나쁜 부분을 숨길 필요도 없어.

1000636961.english: Perrault sure is quick on the uptake.

1000636966.english: …The first time should be according to Lilith' preference, right?

1000636972.english: ...Why are you doing this to the Queen? The Queen… No, to a failure like me?&n...Are you still talking about happiness? That you're making me happy?&n...Yes. I lost. It's the Queen's defeat. I'll do whatever you want... Make the Queen happy.&n
1000636972.korean: ...어째서 여왕에게 이렇게까지 하는 거야? 여왕… 아니, 나같은 실패작한테?&n...아직도 행복 같은 소리를 하는 거야? 나를 행복하게 해준다고…? &n...그래. 내가 졌어. 여왕의 패배야. 전부 네가 원하는 대로 해 줄테니까… 여왕을 행복하게 만들어봐.

1000636978.english: It's already been an hour since Brownie bombed the training area. Isn't it about time to get up?
1000636978.korean: 브라우니가 원산폭격한지 벌써 1시간째에요. 슬슬 일어나게 해도 괜찮지 않을까요?

1000636982.english: I don't like that tone of voice…

1000636984.english: Calm down, Sergeant Efreeti. The entire Steel Line is family, after all.
1000636984.korean: 진정하세요, 이프리트 병장님. 스틸라인 전부는 가족이잖아요.

1000636986.english: Family should be protected by family.

1000636987.english: Family…? These days family puts toilet paper in their pants and runs the washing machine…?
1000636987.korean: 가족...? 요즘 가족은 바지에 휴지 넣고 세탁기 돌리니...?

1000636988.english: It's very different from the meaning I knew…

1000636991.english: Still, I can see that you're sorry, Sergeant.
1000636991.korean: 그래도 미안해하는 게 눈에 보이잖아요, 병장님.

1000636992.english: Feeling remorse for your mistakes...? That's good…

1000636995.english: Do you remember a few days ago when someone broke the dorm lights...?
1000636995.korean: 며칠 전에 누가 생활관 전등 깼던 거 기억나...?

1000636997.english: Some people plastered gun imports with benzene so thickly that it caught fire…
1000636997.korean: 누구는 총기 수입을 강증유로 떡칠해서 불나고...

1000636999.english: There was also a kid who left a record on the secret network, and the unit went into chaos…
1000636999.korean: 또 어떤 애가 시크릿 네트워크 기록 남겨서 부대가 뒤집혔었는데...

1000637001.english: Well, still, Brownie is improving every time.
1000637001.korean: 그, 그래도 브라우니는 매번 발전하고 있어요.

1000637002.english: I never said it was a brownie...?

1000637007.english: Sergeant Efreeti, your words were excessive.

1000637008.english: I've already gone easy on you a lot... It's for Brownie…

1000637009.english: Haam... then I guess I'll sleep a little more…
1000637009.korean: 하암... 난 그럼 좀 더 자야지...

1000637010.english: - I came in after seeing Brownie run out of the Steel Line dormitory, and the outfits of the Gnome and Efreeti were…
1000637010.korean: - 스틸라인 생활관에서 브라우니가 뛰쳐나오는 걸 보고 들어왔더니 노움과 이프리트의 차림새가...

1000637013.english: - Just as I was about to ask what had happened, my eyes fell on the gnome and Efreeti's battle outfits, with the gnome having taken its last breath in a miserable state.
1000637013.korean: - 무슨 일인지 물어보려는 순간, 처참한 모습으로 숨을 거둔 노움과 이프리트의 전투복이 눈에 들어왔다.

1000637017.english: They left the gas regulator behind.

1000637019.english: Wraithy asked me earlier what I told Neodym. What happened?
1000637019.korean: 아까 레이시 양이 네오딤 양에게 뭘 알려줬냐고 묻더라구요. 무슨 일인가요?

1000637023.english: It's the worst... I've been getting scolded since this morning...

1000637024.english: I tried my best... but now it's gotten to the point where I have to ask permission even to breathe...
1000637024.korean: 열심히 하려 한건데... 이젠 숨 쉬는 것도 허락 맡고 쉬어야 할 판임다...

1000637025.english: I'm really useless... Ugh, I don't even have the strength to sing...
1000637025.korean: 전 정말 쓸모없지 말임다... 으으, 노래할 힘도 없어...

1000637028.english: W-Did you come to comfort me...?

1000637029.english: But to me... I don't deserve comfort from Corporal Leprechaun...
1000637029.korean: 하지만 저에겐... 레프리콘 상병님께 위로를 받을 가치가 없슴다...

1000637030.english: It might actually be more rewarding to be buried in the fields and become fertilizer...
1000637030.korean: 차라리 경작지에 묻혀 비료가 되는 게 더 보람 있을지도 모름다...

1000637031.english: What do you mean by that?

1000637032.english: Now, eat this and pull yourself together.

1000637033.english: This is...! Isn't this a can of tuna?

1000637034.english: I'll take it. I don't really like tuna.

1000637037.english: ...But why did you come out wearing my combat boots?

1000637038.english: Oh, right. These combat boots belong to Brownie. Please give me back the slippers I'm wearing.
1000637038.korean: 아, 맞다. 이 전투화 브라우니 거예요. 신고 있는 제 슬리퍼 돌려주세요.

1000637040.english: You've blamed yourself enough, haven't you? That won't change the situation.
1000637040.korean: 자책은 그정도면 충분히 했죠? 그런다고 상황이 달라지진 않아요.

1000637041.english: If you keep trying, others will recognize your efforts.
1000637041.korean: 계속 노력하면 다른 분들도 알아줄 거예요.

1000637043.english: Then I'll go in first. Please take your time coming in.
1000637043.korean: 그럼 전 먼저 들어가 볼게요. 천천히 들어오세요.

1000637045.english: Corporal Leprechaun was right, as she never got angry even when someone stole and ate rice noodle rations, accidentally lowered her shirt in front of the Commander, or put her feet up during bedtime.
1000637045.korean: 쌀국수 부식을 훔쳐 먹어도, 실수로 사령관 각하 앞에서 상의를 내려도, 취침시간에 발을 올려도 화내지 않던 레프리콘 상병님 말이 맞슴다.

1000637046.english: Nothing changes just by suffering in silence!
1000637046.korean: 혼자 끙끙 앓는다고 달라지는 건 없슴다!

1000637047.english: Isn't the important thing what happens next?

1000637049.english: I'm going to cheer up once again!

1000637052.english: Didn't you say you were giving out rice cakes after the event...?
1000637052.korean: 이번에 행사 끝나고 떡 불출한다고 하지 않았어...?

1000637054.english: Why isn't there one in our barracks...?

1000637055.english: What? We issued a box of rice cakes, just like the other barracks.
1000637055.korean: 네? 다른 생활관이랑 똑같이 떡 한 상자 불출했는데요?

1000637058.english: Corporal Leprechaun. Did you call me?

1000637060.english: Brownie? She went out a little while ago saying she had something to do. What is it?
1000637060.korean: 브라우니요? 아까 밖에 볼일이 있다고 나갔는데, 무슨 일이세요?

1000637065.english: You two are being too much!

1000637066.english: No matter how slow Brownie is at learning work, how always she causes trouble, and how often she gets dragged off by the duty officer to get scolded when she's bored!
1000637066.korean: 아무리 브라우니가 일 배우는 게 느리고, 맨날 사고만 치고, 심심하면 당직사관님에게 끌려가 혼난다고 해도!

1000637067.english: Cut the comms during the serious maintenance, dozing off during outpost duty…
1000637067.korean: 진지 보수 공사할 때 통신선 끊어 먹고, 초소 근무 중에 졸고...

1000637068.english: …After guard duty, caught eating tteokbokki in the mess hall, climbing on the bunk with combat boots on…
1000637068.korean: ...경계근무 마치고 취사반에서 떡볶이 먹다 걸리고, 침상에 전투화 신고 올라가고...

1000637069.english: Shooting at the next lane during live-fire drills, making soldiers from other units wear provocative outfits…
1000637069.korean: 사, 사격훈련 때 옆 사로 과녁판 쏘고, 타 부대 사람들에게 선정적인 복장을 입히고 다니지만!

1000637070.english: But! I've always been working hard!

1000637074.english: Uh, anyway, I don't think we should always be suspicious like this.
1000637074.korean: 어, 어쨌든 이런 식으로 무조건 의심하는 건 아니라고 봐요.

1000637075.english: Even if everyone else makes fun of Brownie, we, the Steel Line family, shouldn't, right?
1000637075.korean: 다른 모든 분들이 브라우니를 우습게 봐도, 한가족인 저희 스틸라인은 그러면 안되잖아요?

1000637079.english: …I'll check one more time too. See where it was missed.
1000637079.korean: ...저도 한 번 더 확인해 볼게요. 어디서 누락됐는지.

1000637083.english: I don't know who it was, but someone left a whole box of rice cakes in the dorm! I secretly hid it so they wouldn't take it back!
1000637083.korean: 누군지 몰라도 생활관에 떡을 한 상자나 두고 갔슴다! 혹시 도로 가져갈까 봐 제가 몰래 숨겨뒀지 말임다!

1000637084.english: I didn't eat many, so there's plenty left. Would you like some… huh? Everyone… why are you staring so coldly? Don't be scary…
1000637084.korean: 몇 개 안 먹어서 많이 남았슴다. 같이 드시겠슴... 어? 다들... 왜 이리 싸늘하게 노려보심까? 무섭지 말임다...

1000637086.english: - I found Brownie wandering in the forest.

1000637087.english: S-Sergeant Commander? What are you doing? It's dangerous to be out alone at night.
1000637087.korean: 사, 사령관 각하? 무슨 일이심까? 야밤에 혼자 나와계시면 위험하지 말임다.

1000637089.english: - Brownie, trailing off, soon fell silent.
1000637089.korean: - 말꼬리를 흐린 브라우니는 곧 입을 다물었다.

1000637090.english: - She was just trampling the innocent ground with her army boots, and I suggested we do something about it because I was afraid she’d end up creating a huge puddle if we left her be.
1000637090.korean: - 애꿎은 땅바닥만 군화로 헤집고 있는데, 그대로 뒀다간 커다란 웅덩이라도 만들 것 같아 제안했다.

1000637091.english: M-me, going with the Sergeant Commander?
1000637091.korean: 제, 제가 사령관 각하와 함께 말임까?

1000637092.english: O-okay! I'll definitely go with you! Hehe…
1000637092.korean: 조, 좋슴다! 무조건 같이 가지 말임다! 헤헤...

1000637093.english: - Joy was evident on the brownie’s face as it looked up, but,
1000637093.korean: - 고개 든 브라우니의 얼굴에 기쁨이 드러났지만,

1000637095.english: - But that didn't last long. She became gloomy again.

1000637096.english: Ah, no. If I go with the Sergeant Commander, I'm sure it would make you upset.
1000637096.korean: 아, 아님다. 저랑 함께 갔다간 사령관 각하께서도 분명히 기분 나쁘실검다.

1000637097.english: I always cause accidents, never do anything properly… sniff…
1000637097.korean: 맨날 사고나 치고, 제대로 하는 일이 하나도 없슴다. 흑....

1000637098.english: - No matter how lively someone is, repeated mistakes tend to erode self-confidence.
1000637098.korean: - 아무리 활발한 사람이라도 계속 실수하면 자존감을 잃기 마련이다.

1000637099.english: - Still, I didn't expect Brownie to have made it this far…

1000637101.english: - On the hill I pointed to, an old outpost had been built.
1000637101.korean: - 내가 가리킨 동산 위엔 낡은 초소가 하나 세워져 있었다.

1000637102.english: - It was newly built because of the Chelchung, but enemies appeared so frequently that it still couldn't be called completely safe.
1000637102.korean: - 철충 때문에 새로 지은 곳인데, 워낙 적이 자주 나타나서 현재까지도 안전하다곤 말 못 하는 곳이었다.

1000637103.english: That place…? Isn't that where the Chelchung appear? What's happening?
1000637103.korean: 저곳은...? 철충들이 나타나는 곳 아님까? 무슨 일이심까?

1000637104.english: No, it's dangerous! A place where the Sergeant Commander could be even slightly at risk is unacceptable!
1000637104.korean: 안 됨다, 위험함다! 사령관 각하가 조금이라도 위험해질 수 있는 곳은 안 되지 말임다!

1000637105.english: B… b… ha! Even if you ask me, there are things I just can't do! It's dangerous!
1000637105.korean: 부... 브... 핫! 저에게 부탁하셔도 안 되는 건 안 됨다! 위험함다!

1000637107.english: - Even after quite some time had passed, Brownie still wasn't sure if she could protect me.
1000637107.korean: - 한참의 시간이 흘러도 브라우니는 자신이 날 지킬 수 있는지 없는지 확신하지 못했다.

1000637108.english: - What Brownie needed, after repeated failures, was just one word of trust.
1000637108.korean: - 연거푸 반복된 실수에 자신감을 잃은 브라우니에게 필요한 건 단 한 마디의 믿음이었다.

1000637109.english: - And I truly did. I trusted Brownie.

1000637110.english: You mean… you trust me, Sergeant Commander…?

1000637111.english: - Brownie, who had been muttering to herself, looked up.
1000637111.korean: - 중얼거리던 브라우니는 고개 들어 위를 올려다봤다.

1000637112.english: - The night sky was nothing unusual, but how would it appear to Brownie?
1000637112.korean: - 특이할 것 없는 밤하늘이었지만 브라우니에겐 어떻게 보일까.

1000637113.english: - Wouldn't a different scene reflect than before?

1000637114.english: - A moment later, Brownie slapped her cheeks with both hands.
1000637114.korean: - 잠시 후, 브라우니가 양손으로 자기 뺨을 두들겼다.

1000637115.english: Understood! I will protect the Sergeant Commander!

1000637116.english: Don't leave it to anyone else!

1000637117.english: Huff… huff… I took them all down!

1000637118.english: Hehe… did I help at all?

1000637120.english: - I hurriedly supported Brownie, who was about to collapse from losing focus.
1000637120.korean: - 집중력을 잃고 쓰러지려는 브라우니를 황급히 부축했다.

1000637121.english: - I was so nervous that I was drenched in sweat, but I didn’t care. It was even more meaningful because it was sweat shed for me.
1000637121.korean: - 바짝 긴장했는지 온몸이 땀으로 축축했지만 개의치 않았다. 나를 위해 흘린 땀이기에 더 가치 있었다.

1000637122.english: I-it's okay, I'm all sweaty right now. It's… messy.
1000637122.korean: 괘, 괜찮슴다, 저 지금 땀범벅임다. 더럽슴다.

1000637125.english: - Arriving at the outpost and leaning against the wall side by side, the surrounding was filled with the sound of insects.
1000637125.korean: - 초소에 도착해 나란히 벽에 기대자, 주변이 풀벌레 소리로 자욱했다.

1000637126.english: - Cool sea breeze, dark night sky, twinkling stars…
1000637126.korean: - 선선한 바닷바람, 묵색 밤하늘, 반짝반짝 빛나는 별들....

1000637128.english: Lately, I've really caused a lot of trouble.
1000637128.korean: 저, 요즘 진짜 사고 많이 쳤슴다.

1000637129.english: I ate all the rations that came into the dormitory alone.
1000637129.korean: 생활관에 들어온 부식을 혼자서 먹어치우질 않나.

1000637130.english: I put clothes with tissue into the dorm's washing machine.
1000637130.korean: 생활관 세탁기에다 휴지 들어간 옷을 넣고 돌리질 않나.

1000637131.english: I wore my superior's slippers without permission.
1000637131.korean: 사수의 슬리퍼를 맘대로 신고 나가지 않나.

1000637132.english: …Haha, I've done so many wrong things I can't even count on ten fingers.
1000637132.korean: ...하하, 잘못한 게 너무 많아 열 손가락으로도 다 셀 수 없슴다.

1000637133.english: - Before I even had a chance to think of what to say to comfort her, Brownie continued speaking.
1000637133.korean: - 어떤 말로 위로해야 할지 고민할 틈도 주지 않고 브라우니가 말을 이어나갔다.

1000637135.english: Could someone like me, Brownie, ever become the main character?
1000637135.korean: 브라우니인 저도 주인공이 될 수 있슴까?

1000637137.english: …I am ultimately just one among countless Brownies.
1000637137.korean: ...전 결국 수많은 브라우니 중 하나에 불과함다.

1000637138.english: Brownies, designed as Steel Line privates and mass-produced with basic capabilities, could never dream of becoming the main character.
1000637138.korean: 스틸라인 이등병으로 설계돼 기초전력으로 대량 양산된 브라우니가 감히 주인공이 될 수 있으리란 생각은 단 한 번도 해본 적 없슴다.

1000637139.english: Only beautiful and outstanding individuals can stand by the Sergeant Commander's side. Not an ordinary Brownie like me, but special people like Commander Marie, Colonel Redhood, and Neodym…
1000637139.korean: 사령관 각하 곁엔 아름답고 뛰어난 이들만 설 수 있슴다. 저같이 평범한 브라우니가 아니라 마리 대장님, 레드후드 연대장님, 그리고 네오딤 양 같은... 특별한 사람만이 곁에 설 수 있슴다.

1000637140.english: That's why I taught Neodym the military songs, that's why I showed her the secret outfit.
1000637140.korean: 네오딤 양에게 군가를 알려준 것도, 비장의 복장을 알려준 것도 그런 이유에서였슴다.

1000637141.english: - To me, everyone on the Orca is special.

1000637142.english: - From the soldiers walking the corridors to those operating outside on missions.
1000637142.korean: - 복도를 오고 가며 만나는 대원들부터 야외에서 작전을 수행하는 대원들까지.

1000637143.english: - I swear, no one is less important. They simply have different roles and objectives; each individual is important, and that thought hasn't changed.
1000637143.korean: - 맹세컨대 누구 하나 덜 중요한 이는 없다. 하는 일과 목적이 다를 뿐, 개개인 모두가 중요하단 생각은 변함없다.

1000637144.english: - When I brought this up seriously, I was met with a hearty laugh.
1000637144.korean: - 이를 진지하게 얘기했더니 상쾌한 웃음이 돌아왔다.

1000637145.english: I understand. The Sergeant Commander treats each and every one of us with care.
1000637145.korean: 알고 있슴다. 사령관 각하께선 저희 한 명 한 명을 모두 소중히 대해주심다.

1000637146.english: What I have said so far is nothing more than self-deprecation that I suffered through in silence.
1000637146.korean: 지금까지 제가 했던 말은 혼자 속으로 끙끙 앓던 자기비하에 불과하지 말임다.

1000637148.english: Starting tomorrow, I will work hard at everything. I will eat meals diligently, give my best in training, and, and I will become great enough to be recognized by everyone.
1000637148.korean: 내일부터 뭐든지 열심히 할 검다. 밥 먹는 것도 열심히 하고, 훈련도 최선을 다하고, 그리고, 그리고 모든 사람에게 인정받을 만큼 대단해질 거지 말임다.

1000637149.english: - Brownie emphasized the word "tomorrow" as she spoke. And as soon as she finished explaining her plans for the future, she turned to look at me.
1000637149.korean: - 브라우니는 내일이란 단어에 힘을 줘서 얘기했다. 그리고 앞으로의 계획을 다 얘기하자마자 이쪽을 돌아봤다.

1000637150.english: So just until today... I will remain a troublemaker.

1000637151.english: - With those words, Brownie's face, who was sitting next to me, suddenly came close.
1000637151.korean: - 그 말과 함께 옆에 앉아있던 브라우니의 얼굴이 순식간에 가까워졌다.

1000637152.english: - Because the closed eyes traced a gentle curve, I also closed my eyes and drew the same picture.
1000637152.korean: - 감긴 두 눈동자가 완만한 곡선을 그려냈기에, 나 또한 눈을 감고 같은 그림을 그렸다.

1000637153.english: - I stayed in the same position for a long time. At the moment when I deluded myself into thinking that the sound of crickets and my thumping heart would continue forever, Brownie's body slipped away.
1000637153.korean: - 한참을 같은 자세로 있었다. 풀벌레 소리와 쿵쾅대는 심장 소리가 영원히 계속될 거라고 착각한 그 순간, 브라우니의 몸이 스르륵 빠져나갔다.

1000637154.english: - When I opened my eyes, Brownie was smiling in an unusually different atmosphere.
1000637154.korean: - 눈을 떴을 땐 평소와는 다른 분위기의 브라우니가 웃고 있었다.

1000637156.english: - At that natural ease, I couldn't help but smile.
1000637156.korean: - 그 천연덕스러움에, 나도 모르게 미소가 배어나왔다.

1000637158.english: It's a relief to see that you seem to have regained your confidence.

1000637159.english: Tell them to stop causing so much trouble in the future...

1000637160.english: Even if you say that, Sergeant, you personally proposed this operation to the Commander, didn't you?
1000637160.korean: 그렇게 말씀하셔도 병장님이 사령관님께 직접 이번 작전을 제안하셨잖아요?

1000637161.english: Does Brownie know that even though you’re strict, you’re actually looking out for her behind the scenes?
1000637161.korean: 엄하셔도 뒤에선 배려하고 계시는 걸 브라우니가 알까요.

1000637162.english: It's no big deal... I'm just going to trust you one last time...
1000637162.korean: 별 거 아냐... 마지막으로 딱 한번만 더 믿어보는 거야...

1000637163.english: I'm going to sleep, so don't wake me up unless something comes up... *Yawn*.
1000637163.korean: 잘 거니까 별일 없으면 깨우지 마... 하암.

1000637166.english: What the... Oh my gosh! Why is she holding the Commander's jacket?!
1000637166.korean: 뭐야, 또... 으히이! 사령관님 상의를 쟤가 왜 들고 있어?!

1000637167.english: Oh my god, oh my god...!

1000637169.english: How can we retreat when Iron Bugs might appear...

1000637172.english: I'm such an enemy for trusting you...

1000637173.english: I think I mistook bleach for detergent...

1000637175.english: They said their stomach hurt so I let them go, but they didn't come out for a long time, so I went to check on them and found only the window open...
1000637175.korean: 배가 아프대서 보내줬는데 한참을 안 나와서 가봤더니 창문만 열려있고...

1000637178.english: You got betrayed because you had expectations in the first place... just like me...
1000637178.korean: 애초에 기대를 하니까 배신 당한 거지... 나처럼...

1000637179.english: Still, I don't think she had bad intentions, Sergeant...
1000637179.korean: 그래도 나쁜 의도는 아니었을 거예요, 병장님...

1000637180.english: Intention...? Is that why you're saying it's intentional right now...?

1000637181.english: I don't intend to serve either...

1000637182.english: Is that even remotely reasonable, soldier?

1000637184.english: Uh, uh, what brings you here, hiccup! And here...? And your outfit...
1000637184.korean: 어, 어, 어쩐 일로, 딸꾹! 여기에...? 게다가 옷차림이...

1000637185.english: Someone replaced the detergent with bleach.

1000637186.english: Tsk tsk. I was finally going to do some laundry, but it all went to waste.
1000637186.korean: 쯧쯧. 모처럼 세탁 좀 하려 했더니 허사가 됐어.

1000637188.english: Why do you hiccup so often?

1000637190.english: Exercise is the best cure for hiccups.

1000637192.english: Enough with the jokes. Who is the culprit in this case?
1000637192.korean: 농담은 이쯤하고, 이 사건의 범인은 누군가?

1000637193.english: It's urgent. We need to find them quickly and bring them over.

1000637194.english: I, I was wrong... I will take responsibility...

1000637195.english: This is not something a mere sergeant can take responsibility for.
1000637195.korean: 일개 병장이 책임질 수 있는 일이 아니다.

1000637196.english: I, a mere Warrant Officer, am no different...

1000637199.english: Hey, was it you?! Huh? Did you say you did that?!

1000637200.english: Ppppppp, why is Colonel Phoenix here...?!

1000637201.english: I heard that she stopped by the commander and did the laundry as well.
1000637201.korean: 사령관님한테 들를 겸 빨래도 같이 돌리셨다더라.

1000637202.english: But the Commander has already left for another place, and the laundry I put away...
1000637202.korean: 근데 사령관님은 이미 다른 곳으로 떠났고, 돌려둔 세탁물들은...

1000637204.english: I have a hunch, so bring the person in as soon as possible.
1000637204.korean: 짐작 가는 구석이 없는 건 아니니 최대한 빨리, 당사자를 데려오도록.

1000637205.english: I will take on Colonel Phoenix, but it won't last long.
1000637205.korean: 내가 피닉스 대령님을 상대하겠지만 오래가진 못할 거다.

1000637206.english: Hurry up. Go ahead, bring that... troublemaker over.

1000637207.english: ...Looks like I've lost all my sleep again today...

1000637215.english: Just wanted to take a short walk.

1000637216.english: Do you want to come with me?

1000637248.english: ...I've never thought of weapons as having any other value... but what does the Master want...?&n…! I understand, Master. From now on, I will serve you for the rest of my life, not as your weapon, but as your possession.&n
1000637248.korean: ...무기에, 다른 가치가 있다고 생각해 본 적은 없습니다만… 마스터가 원하시는 것이…?&n…! 알겠습니다, 마스터. 앞으로 마스터의 무기가 아닌, 마스터의 것으로서 일평생... 보필하겠습니다.

1000637249.english: This, to me…? Why, why…? You like me…? ......! Now, wait a minute…! I couldn't even imagine something like this-&nWow…? Oh, please don't look at my face…! I'm sure I'm making a really ugly expression right now… You say I'm pretty…&n If I hear you say that, I might actually believe you... ? Are you serious... ? I'm glad I'm not the only one who likes you.&n
1000637249.korean: 이걸, 저에게…? 어째, 서…? 저를… 좋아하신다구요…? ......! 자, 잠깐만요…! 이런건 상상도 못해서-&n꺅…? 어, 얼굴은 보지 말아주세요…! 저 분명, 지금 엄청 못난 표정을 하고 있을텐데… 예쁘다니…&n그런 말을 들어버리면, 저… 진짜로 믿어버릴지도 모른다구요…? 진심이시군요…? 저만 좋아하는 게 아니라서… 다행, 이에요.

1000637250.english: - I walk down the hallway, trying to calm my pounding heart.

1000637251.english: - The Orca members are frantically busy, regardless of whether they are in combat or non-combat roles.
1000637251.korean: - 오르카 대원들은 전투, 비전투 인원을 가리지 않고 눈코뜰 새 없이 바쁘다.

1000637252.english: - They might not like having more extra work like this arise, but...
1000637252.korean: - 이런 업무외의 일이 더 생겨나는 건 싫어할지도 모르지만...

1000637253.english: - Right. Even if everyone else opposes it, that guy alone...

1000637254.english: - While walking and lost in thought, I arrived in front of the room I had set out to enter.
1000637254.korean: - 이런 저런 생각을 하며 걷는 사이 목표로 한 방 앞에 도착했다.

1000637255.english: - I took a deep breath, flung open the door, and stepped inside, speaking the words I had prepared.
1000637255.korean: - 잠시 심호흡을 하고 벌컥 문을 열고 들어가며, 준비한 말을 꺼냈다.

1000637258.english: This reaction from Griffon and Harpyia is within the expected range.
1000637258.korean: - 그리폰과 하르페이아의 이런 반응은 예상 범위 내다.

1000637259.english: - But there is only one person... the one I targeted...!
1000637259.korean: - 하지만 단 한 명... 내가 목표로 한 사람만은...!

1000637260.english: Haha. Commander, what are you talking about?
1000637260.korean: 하핫. 사령관, 무슨 말을 하는 거야?

1000637261.english: The idea that we're idols is ridiculous.

1000637262.english: Is it time to get ready for reconnaissance? Harpe, can you call the others?
1000637262.korean: 슬슬 정찰 준비할 시간인가? 하르페, 다른 애들 좀 불러줄래?

1000637265.english: Then I'll go ahead. Take your time.
1000637265.korean: 그럼 난 먼저 가있을게. 천천히 와~

1000637268.english: - My concern for Sleipnir outweighed my sadness at having my trump card rejected.
1000637268.korean: - 내 비장의 계획이 거절당한 것에 대한 상심보다도, 슬레이프니르에 대한 걱정이 앞섰다.

1000637269.english: At my words, Harpyia and Griffon let out a deep sigh at the same time.
1000637269.korean: - 내 말에 하르페이아와 그리폰이 동시에 땅이 꺼져라 한숨을 내쉬었다.

1000637270.english: I just acted like a fool as usual and got scolded.
1000637270.korean: 그냥 평소처럼 바보짓했다가 한소리 들은 것 뿐이야.

1000637271.english: I said the exact same thing as the commander a while ago.

1000637274.english: There was something suspicious about Griffon's usual curt reaction.
1000637274.korean: - 여느때와 같은 그리폰의 퉁명스러운 반응에 뭔가 짚히는 점이 있었다.

1000637276.english: Commander, it's not a Griffon this time.

1000637281.english: Lindy, can I use your face mask?
1000637281.korean: 린티, 나 마스크팩 좀 써도 돼?

1000637283.english: Thanks. I'll give you mine later.

1000637286.english: Rinti really can't take her eyes off the hand mirror.
1000637286.korean: 진짜 린티는 손거울에서 눈을 안 떼네.

1000637287.english: I'm worried it might get a hole in it soon at this rate...
1000637287.korean: 이러다 곧 구멍나는 거 아닐까 싶어...

1000637288.english: You're cute today too, so stop looking at me~

1000637289.english: Hmm, maybe? I should get a face mask too~

1000637290.english: That's right. Did you go give your commander some chocolate?
1000637290.korean: 맞다. 너희 사령관님한테 초콜릿 주고 왔어?

1000637291.english: I did give it to you, but...

1000637292.english: Commander, seeing you buried in chocolate, I felt sorry even as I gave it to you...
1000637292.korean: 사령관님, 초콜릿에 파묻혀 계시는 걸 보니까 드리면서도 죄송했어...

1000637293.english: I should get Lindy out quickly too. I just need to pack it up— Eh?!
1000637293.korean: 린티도 빨리 드려야겠네. 포장만 하면 되니까- 에에?!

1000637294.english: Is this all the face mask?!

1000637295.english: Sorry... I guess it's because we've been using it a lot lately.
1000637295.korean: 미안... 요새 우리가 많이 써서 그런가봐.

1000637296.english: Come to think of it, what about yours? Did you use them all up already?
1000637296.korean: 그러고보니 너희 거는? 벌써 다 쓴 거야?

1000637297.english: Doing it several times a day is actually not good.
1000637297.korean: 하루에 여러 번 하면 오히려 안 좋다구.

1000637298.english: Lately, the squad leader has been doing packs ten times a day and borrowing a lot of ours.
1000637298.korean: 요새 전대장이 팩을 하루에 열 번씩 하면서 우리 걸 엄청 빌려갔거든.

1000637299.english: That idiot, I told you she even left with it attached last time when she went out on sortie.
1000637299.korean: 그 멍충이, 저번에는 출격할때도 붙이고 나갔다니까.

1000637300.english: I was so startled when something like an egg ghost suddenly flew in.
1000637300.korean: 무슨 달걀귀신 같은 게 슉 날아오길래 얼마나 놀랐는지.

1000637301.english: Ah! Come to think of it, she borrowed a lot of other cosmetics from Lindy too.
1000637301.korean: 아! 그러고보니 린티한테 다른 화장품도 많이 빌려갔어.

1000637302.english: Hmm... something interesting might happen soon?

1000637306.english: The time of catastrophe has come.

1000637308.english: Haa, let's not even talk about it...

1000637309.english: Isn't that great! Isn't it exciting!

1000637310.english: We're making a debut by writing the song and even doing the producing ourselves!
1000637310.korean: 우리가 곡을 만들고, 프로듀싱까지해서 데뷔하는 거야!

1000637312.english: Right, Black Hound is a healing-type idol!

1000637314.english: If I were in a band... hmm... definitely bass!
1000637314.korean: 밴드 같은 걸 한다면, 음... 역시 베이스지!

1000637315.english: As for the outfits... since we need to unify the theme, we'll go with a sophisticated look, but go for cuteness with the accessories.
1000637315.korean: 의상은... 코드를 통일해야 하니까 세련된 건 가져가되, 악세사리에서 귀여움을 주는 쪽으로-

1000637316.english: Would you like to sit here for a moment?

1000637319.english: I'm telling you, it's actually kind of scary...

1000637320.english: It's scarier when someone speaks softly while smiling...

1000637321.english: You know our assigned reconnaissance area has increased, right?
1000637321.korean: 우리가 맡은 정찰 구역 늘어난 거 알고 있지?

1000637323.english: Still, that can be sufficiently covered. If you plan the route and schedule well—
1000637323.korean: 그래도 그건 충분히 커버할 수 있어. 동선이랑 계획을 잘 짜면-

1000637326.english: Ah, I haven't written it yet. B-but I can write it right away! It'll be quick!
1000637326.korean: 아, 아직은 안 짰어. 그, 그래도 바로 짤 수 있어! 금방 하니까!

1000637327.english: I understand. I know the squad leader's capabilities for sure.
1000637327.korean: 알았어. 전대장의 능력은 확실히 알고 있으니까.

1000637332.english: I rely on you too much, Commander. Wouldn't it be better to do it after I have a little more leeway?
1000637332.korean: 사령관님한테 의지하는 부분이 너무 많아. 좀 더 여유가 생기고 나서 하는게 좋지 않을까?

1000637334.english: I'm sad about that too. So let's definitely do it next time, okay?
1000637334.korean: 나도 아쉬워. 그러니까 나중에 꼭 하자. 응?

1000637339.english: That said, I didn’t expect her to suddenly turn into a model citizen.
1000637339.korean: 그렇다고 갑자기 바른 생활 바이오로이드가 될 줄은 몰랐지만.

1000637340.english: Because I cannot let them have false hope.
1000637340.korean: 헛된 희망을 가지게 할 수는 없으니까요.

1000637342.english: Hello, Commander. What brings you here?

1000637343.english: She said she wants to be an idol.

1000637345.english: He told us to become idols, this idiot.

1000637347.english: - I steeled myself as I looked at the troubled-looking black hound.
1000637347.korean: - 난처한듯한 블랙 하운드를 보며 마음을 다잡았다.

1000637351.english: Could it really be that good…

1000637352.english: Becoming an idol after singing like that, it makes sense.
1000637352.korean: 그렇게 노래를 부르던 아이돌을 하게 됐는데, 그럴만도 하지 뭐.

1000637353.english: Are you looking forward to it too, Griffon?

1000637354.english: I-I'm not looking forward to it at all. What's the point of doing that? It's just annoying.
1000637354.korean: 나, 나는 전혀 기대 안되거든? 그런 걸 해서 뭐해? 귀찮기만 하지.

1000637358.english: But what exactly does it take to become an idol? Is it in a book somewhere…?
1000637358.korean: 근데 아이돌이 되려면 정확히 뭘 해야하는걸까? 책에 나와있으려나...

1000637359.english: Practice singing and choreography, stuff like that, right?
1000637359.korean: 노래랑 안무 연습하고, 뭐 그런거 아니겠어?

1000637360.english: I guess… I'm not confident about choreography…

1000637361.english: Shall I explain it for you?

1000637363.english: Don't scare me like that… but what's with those glasses?

1000637364.english: Can you even see what's in front of you?

1000637365.english: It is a tool for self-suggestion when explaining something. Then.
1000637365.korean: 무언가를 설명할 때, 자기암시를 위한 도구입니다. 그럼.

1000637366.english: Ahem... Idol. It means an idol.

1000637367.english: An idol is, by definition, a being meant to be an icon. They must take the stage through singing, acting, and other means to express their charms.
1000637367.korean: 아이돌이란 무릇 우상이되는 존재. 노래, 연기 등으로 무대에 올라 자신의 매력을 피력해야합니다.

1000637368.english: Hmm... so I just need to practice hard?
1000637368.korean: 음... 그럼 연습만 열심히 하면 되는 거야?

1000637369.english: It’s not much different from what our Sky Knights originally handled.
1000637369.korean: 우리 스카이나이츠가 원래 맡던 거랑 크게 다르지도 않네.

1000637370.english: heard they did a lot of things like air shows and stuff like that, right?

1000637371.english: It is different. Because idols are products.

1000637372.english: Being injected with knowledge and visuals like a factory production line and shipped out in order to play the image and character that the public wants.
1000637372.korean: 대중이 원하는 모습, 대중이 원하는 캐릭터를 연기하기 위해 마치 공장의 생산라인처럼 지식과 비주얼을 주입받고 출하되는 것.

1000637373.english: That is exactly what an idol is.

1000637374.english: Is... is it really necessary to go that far? Right now...
1000637374.korean: 그, 그렇게까지 할 필요 있을까? 지금은...

1000637375.english: The definition of a concept is important.

1000637376.english: Only by following it can you say that you truly understand it.
1000637376.korean: 그것을 따라야만 진정 그것을 이해했다고 할 수 있겠죠.

1000637378.english: In that sense, Commander, your support is truly timely.
1000637378.korean: 그런 의미에서, 사령관님의 지원은 정말 시기적절하군요.

1000637379.english: Since we, with the exception of the former leader, lack experience, we would be lacking in many ways for self-producing.
1000637379.korean: 전대장 외에는 경험이 없는 저희가 셀프 프로듀싱을 하기엔 여러모로 부족할테니.

1000637381.english: But weren't you the only one who knew Momo?
1000637381.korean: 근데 너, 모모밖에 모르는 거 아니었어?

1000637382.english: M-Momo is just my favorite, that's all?

1000637383.english: Why are you making such a big deal out of it? It's a great opportunity to make a huge impression on the Commander, isn't it?
1000637383.korean: 뭘 그렇게 어렵게 생각해? 사령관님한테 엄~청 어필할 기회잖아?

1000637384.english: If the Commander sees Lindy dancing and singing cutely and prettily on stage, he'll be totally smitten, won't he?
1000637384.korean: 린티가 무대에서 귀엽고 예쁘게 춤추고 노래하는 걸 보면 사령관님은 완~전 헤벌레하실걸?

1000637385.english: So, just do your makeup nicely, get a cute outfit from Audrey, and practice a bit~
1000637385.korean: 그러니까 그냥 메이크 업 예쁘게 하구, 오드리 님한테 귀여운 의상 받아서 연습 좀 해서~

1000637386.english: I'm saying it'll be over once I show the Commander my singing~
1000637386.korean: 노래하는 걸 사령관님한테 보여주면 끝난다는 말씀~

1000637387.english: Then, the completely moved Commander... Lindy... Ehehe...
1000637387.korean: 그러면 완전 감동하신 사령관님이, 린티를... 에헤헷...

1000637390.english: Lindy, Hraesvelgr. Both of you. You can't have that kind of mindset!
1000637390.korean: 린티, 흐레스벨그. 너희 둘 다. 그런 마음가짐이면 안 돼!

1000637391.english: Idols exist for their fans. The fans' love is their very reason for existence!
1000637391.korean: 아이돌은 팬들을 위해 존재하는 거야. 팬들의 사랑이 바로 존재 의의라구!

1000637393.english: So... that's why... the Commander is a fan of that.

1000637394.english: Lindy only needs the Commander's love~

1000637395.english: That is idealism. You won't be able to become an idol with passion alone.
1000637395.korean: 이상론이군요. 열정만 가지고는 아이돌이 될 수 없을겁니다.

1000637397.english: Guys, let's go back and talk for now.

1000637398.english: We need to hear the Commander's side of the story, too.

1000637402.english: - Upon the return of the Sky Knights after completing their mission, I told them the plan that they would undergo training to become idols for a while and then take the stage.
1000637402.korean: - 임무를 마치고 돌아온 스카이나이츠에게 앞으로 얼마간 아이돌이 되기 위한 훈련을 거치고, 무대에 오르게 될 것이라는 계획을 들려주었다.

1000637403.english: - When I and several experts promised full support, the team members' eyes lit up.
1000637403.korean: - 여러 전문가들과 내가 전폭적인 지원을 해주기로 약속하자, 대원들이 눈빛이 초롱초롱해졌다.

1000637404.english: That is an intriguing proposal. If you support it, Commander, the factors I was worried about will disappear.
1000637404.korean: 흥미가 돋는 제안입니다. 사령관님이 지원해주신다면, 걱정하던 요소도 사라지겠군요.

1000637405.english: Commander~ Your Lindy will show you the cutest side of herself on stage!
1000637405.korean: 사령관님~ 사령관님의 린티가 무대에서 최고로 귀여운 모습을 보여드릴게요!

1000637406.english: It looks like it'll be fun, but... I'm worried...

1000637409.english: So, Griffon isn't really keen on it?

1000637410.english: It's not, it's not like that... Besides, I have a mission to carry out...
1000637410.korean: 그, 그런건 아닌데... 원래 임무도 있는데다가...

1000637411.english: Well then... I have nothing to say...

1000637414.english: I've gotten so used to calling you Commander...
1000637414.korean: 사령관님이라고 부르는 게 너무 익숙해져 있어서...

1000637417.english: It's just that the way I'm addressed has changed, but somehow... it makes my heart flutter...

1000637418.english: I think the male lead in the romance novel I borrowed last time was a producer...
1000637418.korean: 저번에 빌렸던 연애소설 남주가 프로듀서였던 것 같은데...

1000637422.english: So, you really want to fall into a forbidden love with the idol Lindy, right? Right?
1000637422.korean: 역시 아이돌 린티랑 같이, 금단의 사랑에 빠지고 싶으신 거죠? 그렇죠오?

1000637424.english: It definitely was going to unfold that way...

1000637425.english: Before an idol singer under the agency goes on stage, in the waiting room with the producer...
1000637425.korean: 소속 아이돌 가수가 무대에 오르기 전, 대기실에서 프로듀서와...

1000637427.english: - As the costumes brought out, the eyes of the team members, who had been sharing stories filled with anticipation, widened in surprise.
1000637427.korean: - 가져온 의상을 꺼내자 각자 기대를 담은 이야기를 나누던 대원들의 눈이 휘둥그레졌다.

1000637431.english: - I handed out the clothes and turned to the other three.
1000637431.korean: - 옷을 나누어 주고 다른 셋에게 고개를 돌렸다.

1000637435.english: The producer's drive is truly amazing. When did you prepare this in advance?
1000637435.korean: 프로듀서의 추진력은 정말 대단하군요. 언제 미리 준비해두신거죠?

1000637436.english: I already have idol outfits, so you can take your time preparing them, Producer.
1000637436.korean: 나는 아이돌 의상 이미 있으니까 천천히 준비해줘도 돼, 프로듀서.

1000637438.english: Producer, may I arrange it to some extent?
1000637438.korean: 프로듀서, 혹시 어느정도 어레인지를 해도 되나요?

1000637441.english: If it were my soulmate, I would make it fit perfectly.
1000637441.korean: 내 영혼의 자매라면 딱 맞게 만들어 줄거야.

1000637444.english: How about Lindy? Isn't she super cute!

1000637446.english: I really love it, Producer. Thank you so much.
1000637446.korean: 엄청 맘에 들어요, 프로듀서님. 정말 감사해요.

1000637447.english: The others will be ready soon too, right?

1000637448.english: - The members chatted away for a while while looking at the idol costumes.
1000637448.korean: - 대원들은 한동안 아이돌 의상을 보며 이야기꽃을 피웠다.

1000637449.english: - After watching her for a while, I got to the point.
1000637449.korean: - 그 모습을 한동안 지켜보다 본론을 꺼냈다.

1000637451.english: - After being discovered by other Sky Knights members, she recalled what she had heard from Sleipnir, who had joined Orca.
1000637451.korean: - 다른 스카이나이츠 대원들에 의해 발견된 후, 오르카에 합류한 슬레이프니르에게 들었던 말을 떠올렸다.

1000637452.english: Yeah. We might have to tweak it a bit if it becomes a group song, but no problem!
1000637452.korean: 응. 단체곡이 되면 조금 손을 봐야겠지만, 문제없어!

1000637453.english: Are we doing this just among ourselves...? I'm a little worried...

1000637456.english: After all, I studied songwriting and composition in my own way!

1000637457.english: So that makes me even more anxious...

1000637458.english: Well... still, it does look kind of fun.
1000637458.korean: 뭐... 그래도 나, 나름 재밌어보이긴 하네.

1000637460.english: Producer~ You have to be careful not to fall too deeply for Lindy~?
1000637460.korean: 프로듀서~ 린티에게 푹 빠지지 않게, 조심하셔야 해요~?

1000637461.english: Hmm, it seems like everyone needs to be a bit more serious.
1000637461.korean: 흠, 다들 좀 더 진지해질 필요가 있어보입니다만.

1000637463.english: It looks like it'll be fun~

1000637464.english: ...Still, I'm not confident in the choreography... Ugh...

1000637466.english: Everyone's ready, right? It starts now.

1000637469.english: - Leaving the enthusiastic Sky Knights behind, I turned my steps toward the captain's quarters.
1000637469.korean: - 의욕에 찬 스카이나이츠를 뒤로 하고 함장실로 발걸음을 돌렸다.

1000637470.english: - I let out a deep sigh without realizing it.

1000637471.english: - I put on a brave face in front of the crew, but this is no ordinary matter. A producer...
1000637471.korean: - 대원들 앞에서는 허세를 부렸지만, 이건 보통 일이 아니다. 프로듀서라니...

1000637472.english: - Ever since I came to my senses, I somehow knew how to deal with Iron Bug and how to command a unit, but I have absolutely no idea how to produce idols.
1000637472.korean: - 나는 정신이 들 때부터 철충을 상대하는 법, 부대를 지휘하는 법은 어쩐지 전부 알고 있었지만, 아이돌을 프로듀싱하는 방법 따위는 전혀 알지 못한다.

1000637473.english: - There is no turning back words once spoken. Swallowing a sigh, I operated the panel to access the Orca database.
1000637473.korean: - 이미 꺼낸 말을 돌이킬 수는 없는 법. 한숨을 주워삼키며 패널을 조작해 오르카 데이터베이스에 접속했다.

1000637474.english: - The Orca Database, constructed by bringing in the server of the archive that existed in the Old World, stores a significant amount of information, if not all of it.
1000637474.korean: - 구세계에 존재하던 기록 보관소의 서버를 가져와 구성한 오르카 데이터베이스에는, 전부는 아니더라도 상당량의 정보가 저장되어있다.

1000637475.english: - Of course, there was no manual like 'How to Become a Producer!', but I was able to find a considerable amount of material regarding idols and songs.
1000637475.korean: - 물론 '프로듀서가 되는 법!' 같은 설명서는 없었지만, 아이돌과 노래에 대한 자료는 상당량을 찾을 수 있었다.

1000637476.english: - Just as I was sorting through the materials and about to read them, the captain's cabin door opened.
1000637476.korean: - 적당히 자료를 분류하고 읽으려고 할 때, 함장실 문이 열렸다.

1000637479.english: - Audrey smiled slightly and sat on the sofa.

1000637480.english: Yes. I can give you everything before the performance.
1000637480.korean: 네. 공연 전에는 전부 드릴 수 있어요.

1000637481.english: Hehe, it's something I do because I enjoy it. Besides...
1000637481.korean: 후후, 제가 좋아서 하는 일인걸요. 거기에...

1000637482.english: I can't let my Soul Sister, Miss Sleipnir, go on stage wearing an outfit like that.
1000637482.korean: 제 소울 시스터인 슬레이프니르 양이 그런 의상을 입고 무대에 오르도록 둘 수는 없죠.

1000637483.english: - At Audrey's words, I recalled when we first met, and the clothes Sleipnir has been wearing lately.
1000637483.korean: - 오드리의 말에 처음 만났을 때, 그리고 요새 슬레이프니르가 입고 다니는 옷을 떠올렸다.

1000637484.english: That’s because he’s the commander. The commander always tells us we’re pretty.
1000637484.korean: 그건 사령관이니까 그렇죠. 사령관은 저희에게 늘 예쁘다고 해주니까.

1000637485.english: Don't worry, I'll make this outfit look great.
1000637485.korean: 이번 의상은 제가 멋지게 만들테니 걱정하지 말아요.

1000637486.english: Have you perhaps tried dressing up the Sky Knights already?

1000637489.english: We can't get it dirty before the stage this time. We don't have the capacity to make a spare.
1000637489.korean: 이번에는 무대 전에 더럽히면 안돼요. 스페어를 만들 여력 까지는 없으니까.

1000637490.english: - Audrey's playful words reminded me of what happened before the party started that winter when I had collapsed.
1000637490.korean: - 오드리의 장난스러운 말에 내가 쓰러졌던 겨울, 파티를 시작하기 전에 있었던 일이 떠올랐다.

1000637491.english: I will prepare the outfit perfectly, so you don't need to worry about it, Commander.
1000637491.korean: 의상은 제가 펄펙트하게 준비할테니까 사령관은 신경쓰지 않아도 돼요.

1000637492.english: Are the other preparations going well?

1000637493.english: - manipulated the panel in response to Audrey's question.

1000637494.english: - I got so lost in thought while searching for this and that that I even forgot Audrey was there.
1000637494.korean: - 이것저것 검색하며 생각에 빠지는 바람에, 오드리가 있다는 것도 잊고 말았다.

1000637495.english: - I wondered how much time had passed, and when I suddenly looked up, Audrey was staring intently at me.
1000637495.korean: - 얼마나 시간이 지났을까, 문득 고개를 들자 오드리는 나를 빤히 바라보고 있었다.

1000637496.english: Haha, no. A man who focuses on something is attractive.
1000637496.korean: 후후, 아니에요. 뭔가에 포커스하는 남자는 매력적이죠.

1000637497.english: Well then, I'll be going now. The Commander too— Ah.

1000637498.english: Is there no problem with Ms. BoRyeon's restoration?

1000637499.english: That's good. Ms. BoRyeon isn't a high-end model like me, but she has outstanding skills.
1000637499.korean: 좋네요. 보련 양은 저처럼 고급 기종은 아니지만, 뛰어난 실력을 갖고 있어요.

1000637500.english: It will be helpful for styling idols beautifully.
1000637500.korean: 아이돌 분들을 뷰리풀하게 꾸미는데에 도움이 되겠죠.

1000637501.english: If there is just one problem... it's that the men have unique tastes?
1000637501.korean: 딱 하나 문제가 있다면... 남성 취향이 독특하다는 정도?

1000637502.english: Hehe, it’s not the kind of thing that would harm the Commander, so don’t worry.
1000637502.korean: 후후, 사령관에게 해가 되는 종류는 아니니 걱정하진 말아요.

1000637503.english: Then I'll be going. Good luck.

1000637504.english: - It seems like I face a crisis every time I meet a new bioroid...
1000637504.korean: - 어째 새로운 바이오로이드를 만날 때마다 위기를 맞는 것 같군...

1000637505.english: - For now, we had the Sky Knights practice on their own under the pretext of training, but this is just a temporary way to buy time.
1000637505.korean: - 일단 연습 명목으로 당분간은 스카이나이츠가 스스로 연습하게 했지만 잠시 시간벌이일 뿐이다.

1000637506.english: - Before starting full-scale practice, you must be fully prepared and have a backup plan ready.
1000637506.korean: - 본격적인 연습에 들어가기 전에 만반의 준비를 갖춰두고, 그에 대한 백업 계획도 준비해야한다.

1000637507.english: - I scrolled through the list of team members on the panel, lost in thought.
1000637507.korean: - 패널을 조작해 대원들 명단을 훑어보며 생각에 잠겼다.

1000637509.english: I wonder what happened to the teacher who was supposed to come?
1000637509.korean: 오기로 한 선생님한테 무슨 일이 생긴걸까?

1000637510.english: I could just teach them myself, but telling them to take care of their health—the producer really is thoughtful...
1000637510.korean: 그냥 내가 가르쳐도 되는데 컨디션 관리를 하라니, 프로듀서도 참 사려깊다니까...

1000637517.english: To think that I, a mere mortal, have to do such menial work...

1000637518.english: What?! I didn't hear that far!

1000637519.english: Haa... I'll let it slide this time. But you won't stand a chance next time.
1000637519.korean: 하아... 이번만 넘어가 줄게. 다음부터는 어림도 없을 줄 알아.

1000637520.english: But... are these the ones I'm supposed to teach?

1000637521.english: Hmm, they're more famous than I thought.

1000637523.english: I'm telling you, I was really famous.

1000637524.english: What? Did you forget that one of the Sky Knights' missions was promotion?
1000637524.korean: 뭐야. 우리 스카이나이츠의 임무 중 하나가 홍보였다는 거 잊었어?

1000637525.english: - I knew from the materials that the Sky Knights were famous in the past, but it is true that it didn't really sink in as I spent time with them.
1000637525.korean: - 스카이나이츠가 과거에 유명세를 떨쳤다는 것은 자료로 보아 알고 있었지만, 부대끼며 같이 지내다보니 잘 와닿지 않았던 것이 사실이다.

1000637526.english: Hmph, do you believe me now?

1000637527.english: Back in the day, people used to line up for kilometers just to see me!
1000637527.korean: 예전에 날 보려고 막, 몇 킬로미터씩 줄을 섰다구!

1000637528.english: Hmph. Even so, it didn't measure up to Lady Draculina's popularity.
1000637528.korean: 흥. 그래봐야 이 드라큐리나 님의 인기엔 못미쳤지.

1000637529.english: They say tens of thousands of people flocked to the final retirement performance before it went to the theme park.
1000637529.korean: 테마파크로 가기 전, 마지막 은퇴 공연엔 몇만 명의 인파가 몰렸다고 하거든?

1000637530.english: It's a shame I can't experience this anymore— What's wrong with you guys? Why are you looking at me like that?
1000637530.korean: 이제는 경험하지 못하는 게 아쉽- 뭐야, 너희. 왜 그런 눈으로 보는 거야?

1000637532.english: Are you out of your mind...?

1000637533.english: I'm glad it's been restored now... because there's a producer.

1000637535.english: Uh, yeah... not 'thank you'! What the hell, seriously!
1000637535.korean: 어, 응... 고마- 워가 아니라! 뭐냐고, 진짜!

1000637536.english: haven't done anything to earn pity from the likes of you- Ack?!
1000637536.korean: 이몸은 너희 따위에게 동정을 살만한 짓은- 꺅?!

1000637537.english: - Unable to resist the compassion welling up inside me, I took Draculina into my arms.
1000637537.korean: - 마음 속에서 피어나는 동정심을 이기지 못하고 드라큐리나를 품에 안았다.

1000637538.english: W-Won't you let go of me?! Ugh, and why are you so strong...!
1000637538.korean: 이, 이거 안 놔?! 으익, 힘은 또 왜이렇게 센 거야...!

1000637539.english: Even her physical abilities are that weak...

1000637540.english: Hey, how long are you going to keep hugging like that? The kid is going to suffocate.
1000637540.korean: 어, 언제까지 그렇게 껴안고 있을거야? 애 숨막혀 죽겠네.

1000637542.english: So, I just need to learn from Draculina for now, right?

1000637543.english: Will the producer be staying as well?

1000637545.english: Now, one by one, come out and make an "Ah" sound.
1000637545.korean: 자, 한 명씩 차례대로 나와서 아~ 하고 소리를 내 봐.

1000637548.english: Are we really going to learn choreography from this person?

1000637549.english: Hmm… isn't it a bit too quiet?

1000637550.english: I thought Carrol or Sunny would be coming…
1000637550.korean: 저는 캐럴 씨나 써니 씨가 오실 줄 알았습니다만...

1000637552.english: I was asked to teach you the know-how of aerial maneuvers.
1000637552.korean: 여러분에게 공중 기동에 대한 노하우를 전달해달라고 부탁받았습니다.

1000637555.english: - An idol must, above all, showcase their individuality.
1000637555.korean: - 아이돌이란 무릇 자신의 개성을 어필해야 하는 법.

1000637556.english: - Sky Knights can fly through the air. That's a unique trait no one else can imitate.
1000637556.korean: - 스카이나이츠는 하늘을 날 수 있다. 다른 누구도 따라올 수 없는 유니크한 개성이라고 할 수 있겠지.

1000637557.english: - So my idea was to use that ability to fly while performing choreography… but the squad's awkward looks immediately shut down my plan.
1000637557.korean: - 그러니 그걸 이용해서 하늘을 날며 안무를... 하는 게 어떨까 하는 나의 기획안은 대원들의 난처한 눈빛에 제동이 걸리고 말았다.

1000637559.english: Lindy doesn't want to sing wearing fancy clothes with flight gear dangling all over…
1000637559.korean: 린티는 기껏 예쁜 옷 입고 비행장비 주렁주렁 매단 채로 노래하고 싶지는 않은데요...

1000637561.english: The producer doesn't understand a girl's heart…

1000637562.english: - Hraesvelgr's words pierced sharply through my heart.

1000637563.english: - While I staggered from the severe damage, Banshee, who had been quietly listening, spoke up.
1000637563.korean: - 심각한 데미지를 입은 내가 휘청거리고 있는 사이, 조용히 듣고 있던 밴시가 입을 열었다.

1000637565.english: "Stay a little while since you're here. There's no sortie today, right?"
1000637565.korean: 온 김에 잠깐 있다 가. 오늘 출격 없지?

1000637566.english: "There was one just a moment ago. With all of you."

1000637569.english: - Under the pleading gaze, I had no choice but to cancel the scheduled practice flight.
1000637569.korean: - 애원하는 시선에 나는 예정되어 있던 연습 비행을 취소할 수밖에 없었다.

1000637571.english: That's right. Have you read the book you borrowed? I heard from Captain May.
1000637571.korean: 맞다. 빌려간 책은 읽어봤어? 메이 대장님한테 들었는데.

1000637573.english: I did read it all, but it was quite difficult to understand.
1000637573.korean: 다 읽기는 했습니다만, 좀처럼 이해하기 어려웠습니다.

1000637574.english: Really? That was actually pretty decent...

1000637576.english: A story about a haughty rich girl falling in love with a soldier who was promoted rapidly based solely on his abilities.
1000637576.korean: 콧대 높은 부잣집 아가씨가 능력만으로 고속 진급한 군인이랑 사랑에 빠지는 내용.

1000637577.english: Yeah, yeah. Lindy enjoyed reading it too, you know.

1000637578.english: It seems the Captain is completely hooked, though...

1000637579.english: That's because I gave it to you according to your taste.

1000637583.english: - I brought drinks to the members, who had completely gotten into a girls' talk atmosphere before I knew it, and decided to just watch.
1000637583.korean: - 어느새 완전히 걸즈토크 분위기로 들어가버린 대원들에게 음료수를 가져다주고, 나는 구경이나 하기로 했다.

1000637585.english: Looking for a Momo bonus novel to recommend to Banshee-
1000637585.korean: 밴시 씨에게 추천드릴 모모 특전 소설을 찾-

1000637587.english: - Hraesvelgr's face turned even redder when I pointed at the Momo figure sitting firmly on the windowsill.
1000637587.korean: - 내가 창틀에 떡하니 자리잡고 있는 모모 피규어를 가리키자 흐레스벨그의 얼굴이 더욱 붉어졌다.

1000637590.english: - Hraesvelgr carried the large trunk to the corner of the room and turned her back.
1000637590.korean: - 흐레스벨그는 커다란 트렁크를 들고 방 구석으로 가서 등을 돌렸다.

1000637591.english: - I was very curious about the contents, but I decided to hold off for now.
1000637591.korean: - 내용물이 몹시 궁금했지만, 일단 참기로 했다.

1000637592.english: Hmm... Now that you ask, I don't know how to answer. To ask what love is...
1000637592.korean: 흐음... 그렇게 물으니 어떻게 대답할지 모르겠네. 사랑이 뭐냐니...

1000637593.english: Do I really have to explain this? That's something you feel with your heart.
1000637593.korean: 꼭 설명을 해야 하는 거야? 그런 건 마음으로 느끼는 거라구.

1000637594.english: I don't even really know that feeling.

1000637595.english: Did you ask the Doombringer squad members too?

1000637596.english: The Captain said his heart was pounding and his head felt foggy, and Miss P-18 Sylphid said one side of her chest was itching.
1000637596.korean: 대장님은 가슴이 두근거리고 머리가 멍해진다고 하시고, 실피드 양은 가슴 한 쪽이 근질거린다고 했습니다.

1000637597.english: Others have also said similar things.

1000637598.english: didn't know A-87 Banshee was struggling with such worries. Who should I have her talk to...
1000637598.korean: - 밴시가 저런 고민을 안고 있는줄은 몰랐다. 누구랑 이야기해보게 하는 게 좋을까...

1000637601.english: ......?! W-what do you mean by that all of a sudden!

1000637602.english: - I believe that the feeling I have for the team members is undoubtedly love.
1000637602.korean: - 내가 대원들에게 느끼는 감정은 틀림없이 사랑이라고 생각한다.

1000637603.english: - But trying to put it into words... I really can't understand it.

1000637604.english: It's just... isn't it something like that? Like, just being together is enough...
1000637604.korean: 그냥... 그런 거 아냐? 같이 있기만 해도 좋다거나...

1000637605.english: - Royal Arsenal or Alexandra of Resonance... No, it has already been proven that it is too one-sided.
1000637605.korean: - 아스널이나 알렉산드라... 아냐, 너무 한쪽으로 편중된다는게 이미 증명됐지.

1000637606.english: Sometimes... even when I get angry because they did something childish... just seeing their face makes me laugh right away...
1000637606.korean: 가끔... 철 없는 짓을 해서 화가 났다가도... 얼굴만 보면 금방 웃음이 나거나...

1000637607.english: - T-14 Miho... is too high-level. Hmm...
1000637607.korean: - 미호... 는 너무 레벨이 높지. 흠...

1000637611.english: This is truly a masterpiece of masterpieces...!

1000637612.english: The novel included as a bonus in the Magical MoMo Season 2 remake!

1000637613.english: masterpiece that, despite being a side story, unfolds the love quadrilateral between Magical MoMo, Magical BaekTo, Great Demon King Faucre, and Magic Gentleman through elegant prose and delicate emotional descriptions, along with a vast setting!!
1000637613.korean: 외전임에도 방대한 설정과 더불어 모모, 백토, 뽀끄루 대마왕, 매직 젠틀맨간의 사각관계를 유려한 문장과 섬세한 감정묘사를 통해 풀어낸 명작!!

1000637616.english: For your information, I have already read it thoroughly ninety times.
1000637616.korean: 참고로 저는 이미 아흔 번이나 정독했다죠.

1000637618.english: Just so you know. This part right here is the real gem. Please, everyone, take a look.
1000637618.korean: 참고로, 참고로 말입니다. 여기 이부분이 정말 진국인데 말이죠. 다들 봐주세요-

1000637620.english: The five Sky Knights and one Doom Bringer had somehow been forcibly pulled into the Magical MoMo story by EB-48G Hraesvelgr.
1000637620.korean: - 스카이나이츠 다섯 명과 둠브링어 한 명은 어느새 흐레스벨그에 의해 강제로 모모 이야기 속으로 말려들고 말았다.

1000637621.english: - Whether fortunate or unfortunate, I was able to escape.
1000637621.korean: - 불행인지 다행인지 나는 빠져나올 수 있었다.

1000637622.english: It turned out I would be learning from A-87 Banshee rather than teaching, but it wasn't a bad result. I'd have to find a choreography teacher again, though.
1000637622.korean: - 밴시가 가르치는게 아니라 배우게 되버렸지만 뭐, 나쁘진 않은 결과다. 안무 선생님은 다시 구해봐야 되겠지만.

1000637623.english: - For now, I need to focus on work… I can come by during group practice.
1000637623.korean: - 지금은 일단 일부터 하고... 그룹 연습할때나 찾아와 봐야겠군.

1000637624.english: practice room set up somewhere in Orca.

1000637627.english: This time, let's try going to the music!
1000637627.korean: 이번엔 음악에 맞춰서 한 번 가보자!

1000637628.english: Where on earth does all that energy just spring from...?
1000637628.korean: 넌 대체 어디서 그렇게 에너지가 샘솟는거야...?

1000637629.english: Of course it's thanks to your burning passion! I'm telling you, set your heart on fire!
1000637629.korean: 당연히 뜨거운 열정 덕분이지! 마음을 불태우라구!

1000637631.english: But I, wearing this Magical MoMo practice outfit, am the strongest.
1000637631.korean: 하지만 이 모모 연습복을 입은 저는 최강.

1000637632.english: It is a pity, but the honor of the best idol goes to me-

1000637633.english: EB-48G Hraesvelgr! Quick, take your position!

1000637634.english: Ugh... At a moment like this...!

1000637635.english: .....You know. P-29 Lindwurm, I realized something huge.

1000637637.english: P-29 Lindwurm is... P-29 Lindwurm who dances and sings...

1000637640.english: Hurry up and get back in formation. I'm going to play some music.
1000637640.korean: 빨리 대열이나 다시 맞춰. 음악 틀게.

1000637641.english: Hey guys... can't we take a short break...?
1000637641.korean: 얘, 얘들아... 잠깐만 쉬었다 하면 안될까...?

1000637642.english: My... my body is moving strangely on its own...

1000637643.english: That's because you're always holed up reading books.

1000637646.english: Hmm... P-22 Harpyia, shouldn't you be on a diet? Look at this.
1000637646.korean: 흐음... 하르페, 다이어트 해야되는 거 아냐? 이것 봐.

1000637648.english: Isn't it because you're relying too much on the equipment? Harpe is the newest model among us, after all.
1000637648.korean: 너무 장비에 의존해서 그런 거 아냐? 하르페는 우리 중에 제일 최신 모델이니까.

1000637649.english: Or perhaps it is because of the thickest chest module among us.
1000637649.korean: 아니면 저희 중에 가장 두꺼운 흉부 모듈 때문일지도 모르겠군요.

1000637652.english: Don't worry. You can do it if you practice!

1000637655.english: - I went to cheer on the practice, but unintentionally ended up secretly watching the members practice.
1000637655.korean: - 연습을 응원하러 갔다가, 본의아니게 대원들이 연습하는 모습을 훔쳐보고 말았다.

1000637656.english: - I feel like I’ve just seen a very beautiful scene from a drama.
1000637656.korean: - 뭔가 아주 아름다운, 드라마의 한 장면을 본 것 같은 기분이 든다.

1000637657.english: - In the practice room, bright laughter like that of teenage girls can be heard along with the sound of music.
1000637657.korean: - 연습실에선 음악소리와 함께 십대 소녀들 같은 밝은 웃음소리가 들려온다.

1000637658.english: - It doesn't seem like the producer needs to get involved this time.
1000637658.korean: - 이번엔 프로듀서가 끼어들 필요는 없어 보인다.

1000637659.english: - I turned on my heel and decided to get back to my duties as commander.
1000637659.korean: - 그대로 발걸음을 돌려, 사령관으로서의 업무를 처리하기로 했다.

1000637660.english: After finishing the battle command, I received a call from P-49 Sleipnir.
1000637660.korean: - 전투 지휘를 마치고 들어오니 슬레이프니르에게서 호출이 들어왔다.

1000637661.english: - Hearing that I would show the practiced song and choreography, I headed to the rehearsal room full of anticipation.
1000637661.korean: - 연습한 노래와 안무를 보여주겠다는 말에 기대에 차서 연습실로 향했다.

1000637664.english: - The members showed clear signs of effort as they performed the simple choreography while singing.
1000637664.korean: - 간단한 안무와 동시에 노래를 하는 대원들에게선 노력의 흔적이 묻어났다.

1000637665.english: - Given the limited preparation time, some shortcomings were still visible, but that also gave a fresh, charming impression, making it feel positive.
1000637665.korean: - 준비 시간이 시간이었던만큼 아직 부족한 부분도 눈에 띄었지만, 그것도 그것 나름대로 풋풋한 느낌이라 긍정적으로 느껴진다.

1000637666.english: - Soon, the song ended, and the slightly breathless members approached me with eager, expectant eyes.
1000637666.korean: - 곧 노래가 끝나고, 살짝 숨을 몰아쉬는 대원들이 기대에 찬 시선으로 내게 다가왔다.

1000637668.english: "Ugh… I messed up the choreography in five places…"

1000637669.english: "Even so, it's much better than the first time."

1000637671.english: "Imagining it is the strongest version of yourself…"

1000637672.english: Hehe, it was a satisfying stage…"

1000637673.english: "Yes. Considering the amount of practice, the result isn't bad at all.
1000637673.korean: 응. 이정도면 연습량에 비해 나쁘지 않은 성과야.

1000637675.english: "Producer, now that you've seen it all, stop standing there dumbly and give us your evaluation."
1000637675.korean: 프로듀서, 다 봤으면 그렇게 멍청하게 있지말고 평가를 해 보라구.

1000637677.english: P/A-00 Griffon's words brought me back to reality. My impressions of the Sky Knights' performance were…
1000637677.korean: - 그리폰의 말에 정신이 돌아왔다. 스카이나이츠의 무대를 본 내 감상은...

1000637680.english: It felt similar to one of the Magical MoMo openings. You made a really great song…
1000637680.korean: 모모 오프닝 중 하나랑 느낌이 비슷했어요. 멋진 곡을 만들었군요...

1000637684.english: The two of them get along well...

1000637686.english: You're not going to perform just this one song, right?
1000637686.korean: 이 곡 하나로만 공연할 건 아닌거죠?

1000637687.english: So, do we have to create the choreography and song again?
1000637687.korean: 그럼 또 우리가 안무랑 노래를 만들어야 하는 거야?

1000637689.english: You look so confident, it seems you have something prepared.
1000637689.korean: 자신만만한 걸 보니 뭐라도 준비해놓은 게 있나보네?

1000637691.english: ......I guess I really am not understood by anyone.

1000637692.english: Hahaha... As expected, this life had no meaning...
1000637692.korean: 후후... 역시 이 생에 의미따윈 없었군...

1000637693.english: Why is your condition getting more and more serious?
1000637693.korean: 너 어째 상태가 점점 심각해져 간다?

1000637694.english: You do intend to hide it, right?

1000637695.english: Is it, is it really that bad?

1000637696.english: - Should I say it doesn't quite resonate with me?

1000637698.english: Then this song is a failure.

1000637700.english: The producer has ordinary ears, right?

1000637701.english: If you don't get a feel for a producer like that the first time you hear them, that will likely be the case for most people.
1000637701.korean: 그런 프로듀서가 처음 들었을때 느낌이 안온다면, 대부분에게 그럴거야.

1000637703.english: I guess we'd become a bit desensitized from hearing it so much. It was a good thing we didn't let the producer hear it beforehand.
1000637703.korean: 우리는 계속해서 들어서 좀 둔감해져 있었나봐. 프로듀서한테 미리 안들려주길 잘했어.

1000637704.english: So what do I do now...? It's going to take a really long time to make a follow-up song without any bass...
1000637704.korean: 그럼 이제 어떡하지...? 아무런 베이스 없이 후속곡을 만드려면 시간이 엄청 오래 걸릴텐데...

1000637707.english: Mew, Muse?! That Muse? No way?!

1000637708.english: Of course! I was a super famous composer and singer bioroid!
1000637708.korean: 당연하지! 엄청 유명한 작곡가 겸 가수 바이오로이드였다구!

1000637709.english: It was my wish to receive a song just once, too!
1000637709.korean: 나도 곡 한 번 받아보는게 소원이었는데!

1000637711.english: - When I told them that preparations were already underway to restore the Muse, everyone seemed relieved.
1000637711.korean: - 이미 뮤즈를 복원하기위한 준비중이라는 이야기를 해주자 다들 안심하는 눈치였다.

1000637712.english: found a few songs in the database and listened to them, and they're really good...
1000637712.korean: 데이터베이스에서 노래 몇 개를 찾아서 들어봤는데, 엄청 좋아...

1000637713.english: There's a wide variety of genres, too? There are even cute songs that are perfect for P-29 Lindwurm's taste!
1000637713.korean: 장르도 다양한데? 린티 취향에 딱 맞는 귀여운 노래도 있어!

1000637714.english: I'm actually worried. Will we be able to handle it?
1000637714.korean: 나는 오히려 걱정돼. 우리가 소화할 수 있을까?

1000637715.english: Tch... It looks like there isn't any anime music...
1000637715.korean: 칫... 애니메이션 음악은 없는 것 같군요...

1000637717.english: - The soldiers' eyes widened in surprise upon hearing my words.
1000637717.korean: - 내 말을 들은 대원들의 눈이 휘둥그레졌다.

1000637721.english: What are you doing clearing your throat like that?

1000637723.english: P/A-00 Griffon, what is your favorite dessert?
1000637723.korean: 그리폰, 너 제일 좋아하는 디저트가 뭐야?

1000637724.english: Dessert? Well, I like juice... and things like shakes. Why?
1000637724.korean: 디저트? 뭐, 쥬스도 좋아하고... 쉐이크 같은 것도 좋아하고. 왜?

1000637729.english: We three need to decide on a unit name.
1000637729.korean: 우리 셋 유닛 이름을 정해야 하잖아.

1000637730.english: Are you planning to use it as a dessert name?

1000637732.english: With the three of us, P-29 Lindwurm is bound to stand out the most, right?
1000637732.korean: 아무래도 우리 셋이면 린티가 가장 돋보일 수밖에 없잖아?

1000637733.english: was thinking, how about going for a sweet and refreshing vibe like P-29 Lindwurm?
1000637733.korean: 린티처럼 달콤하고 상큼한 느낌으로 하는게 어떨까 싶어서~

1000637734.english: Hmm, Blackie is cute and compact so it's fine, but P/A-00 Griffon might not suit it...
1000637734.korean: 음, 블랙이는 오밀조밀 귀여우니까 괜찮은데 그리폰은 안어울릴지도...

1000637736.english: Since P-29 Lindwurm likes mint, orange, and pudding, then...
1000637736.korean: 린티는 민트랑 오렌지맛, 그리고 푸딩을 좋아하니까, 그러면...

1000637737.english: Mint... lemonade...? No, if that's the case, how about orange lemonade...? Hmm...
1000637737.korean: 민트... 에이드...? 아냐, 그럴바엔 오렌지 에이드...? 으음...

1000637739.english: We can just decide on something. Just take the first letters of the three of us—
1000637739.korean: 그냥 적당히 정하면 되잖아. 우리 셋 앞글자를 따서-

1000637740.english: Tsk tsk. That's why P/A-00 Griffon don't work out.

1000637741.english: The name is the most important element in determining a group's identity.
1000637741.korean: 이름이야말로 그룹의 정체성을 정하는 중요한 요소라구.

1000637746.english: How about it? Mint chocolate shake! For short, Minchoshake!

1000637749.english: Right? Hello~ It's P-29 Lindwurm from Mint Chocolate Shark~ Kyaa~

1000637750.english: Still, let's not cut it short. It sounds like I'm swearing.
1000637750.korean: 그래도 줄이는 건 하지말자. 욕하는 것 같잖아.

1000637752.english: Anyway, P/A-00 Griffon has no complaints, right?

1000637754.english: Okay! Then I'll go with the mint chocolate shake!

1000637756.english: I thought it would be better than starting from scratch, so I took over what the former commander was making... but as it is, I don't think...
1000637756.korean: 0에서 시작하는 것보다는 나을 것 같아서 전대장이 만들던거 받아왔긴 했는데... 이대로는 아무래도...

1000637757.english: Yeah. It's terrible. If you're going to use it as is, it's better not to be an idol.
1000637757.korean: 응. 너무 구려. 그대로 쓸바엔 아이돌 안하는 게 나아.

1000637758.english: Then P-29 Lindwurm will redo the song concept from scratch. The title and lyrics!
1000637758.korean: 그럼 린티가 곡 컨셉부터 다시 잡을게. 제목이랑 가사!

1000637759.english: Actually, I've already decided on the title~

1000637763.english: It's a song where I confess my feelings to someone I like and ask them to like me back. Plus, the vibe is cute and exciting!
1000637763.korean: 좋아하는 사람한테 마음을 고백하고, 나를 좋아해달라고 하는 노래야. 거기에 분위기는 귀엽고 신나게!

1000637765.english: P-29 Lindwurm looked it up a bit, and found out about these "hook songs." Give them a listen.
1000637765.korean: 린티가 좀 찾아봤는데, 후크송? 이란게 있더라구. 들어봐.

1000637767.english: Right, right! Finish it cutely and play it for the producer on stage!
1000637767.korean: 그치그치! 귀~엽게 완성해서, 무대에서 프로듀서한테 들려주는 거야!

1000637770.english: Still, I'm too worried about leaving the lyrics solely to P-29 Lindwurm. I'll do it with you.
1000637770.korean: 그래도 가사를 린티한테만 맡기는 건 너무 불안해. 나도 같이할게.

1000637772.english: ...Why are you looking at me like that? Do you have a problem?

1000637774.english: Then I'll fix the melody and accompaniment a bit.
1000637774.korean: 그럼 내가 멜로디랑 반주를 좀 고쳐볼게.

1000637775.english: Can you do it by yourself?

1000637776.english: The producer and Muse said they would help, so it should be fine. I'll be studying various things too.
1000637776.korean: 프로듀서랑 뮤즈가 도와준댔으니까 괜찮을거야. 나도 이것저것 공부할거구.

1000637777.english: If you're short-handed, let me know. I'll help too.

1000637778.english: Then, let's get started in earnest after we return from our regular reconnaissance. I'll go get ready.
1000637778.korean: 그럼 정기 정찰 나갔다와서 본격적으로 시작하자. 난 준비하러 갈게.

1000637780.english: Hehe, I've never seen a P/A-00 Griffon that enthusiastic before~
1000637780.korean: 킥킥, 그리폰이 저렇게 의욕적인 건 처음보네~

1000637781.english: I know, right. To someone who doesn't know, it might look like I'm doing it reluctantly.
1000637781.korean: 그러게. 모르는 사람이 보면 마지못해서 하는 것처럼 보이겠지만.

1000637782.english: I'm looking forward to seeing what kind of cringe-worthy lyrics you come up with~ P-29 Lindwurm should just stick to rapping~
1000637782.korean: 어떤 닭살 돋는 가사를 써올지 기대되는걸~ 린티는 랩이나 써야지~

1000637783.english: I can hear everything! Just hurry up and come!

1000637785.english: Let's hurry. I'm going to get a smack on the head.

1000637788.english: ‘Fall in Love… then Love Me Baby…'
1000637788.korean: 폴 인 러브... 그 다음에 럽미 베이베...

1000637790.english: Done! The rap part is complete!

1000637796.english: From head to toe, overflowing with floral scent!

1000637797.english: My heart's springing too, it's love, Boy!

1000637798.english: W-what… why are you this good?

1000637800.english: Ahh~ Where does P-29 Lindwurm's talent even end… she's just so adorable~
1000637800.korean: 아아~ 린티의 재능은 대체 어디까지인걸까... 너무 사랑스럽잖아~

1000637802.english: By the way, the next two lines below? Haven't practiced them?"
1000637802.korean: 근데 이 밑에 두마디는? 연습 안했어?

1000637803.english: Ah, that part? Blackie's going to do it.

1000637805.english: P-29 Lindwurm will add the ad-libs. Uh-uh, one-two.

1000637807.english: Of course! Just let your body follow the rhythm and the swag.
1000637807.korean: 그럼그럼! 그냥 리듬과 스웩에 몸을 맡기면 돼.

1000637810.english: Why? You don't like the lyrics? Should I change them?

1000637812.english: Am I the right me for you…?

1000637813.english: Yeah. I like it. I'll give it a try.

1000637814.english: Let's do that and then divide the parts. The chorus lyrics are all done too.
1000637814.korean: 그거 하고 파트 분배하자. 후렴 가사도 다 됐어.

1000637815.english: Hmm… I think the lyricist put too much of their own feelings into it.
1000637815.korean: 음... 작사가님의 사심이 너무 많이 들어간 것 같은데요?

1000637817.english: If I shut up, I can't sing~

1000637819.english: Wow, the second verse lyrics are really cute. The chorus is good too.
1000637819.korean: 우와, 2절 가사 되게 귀엽다. 후렴구도 좋은 것 같아.

1000637820.english: They say that in a hook song, repeated lyrics are important.

1000637821.english: How's the song? Is it okay?

1000637822.english: Yeah. I've got a pretty good feel for it now.

1000637823.english: If the Muse checks it a few more times, it'll get even better.
1000637823.korean: 나중에 뮤즈가 몇 번 봐주면 훨씬 더 좋아질 것 같아.

1000637824.english: Good thing we have the data in the database…

1000637825.english: Thinking about it, it's funny. We were originally military, yet now we get to sing and dance.
1000637825.korean: 생각해보니 웃기다. 우린 원래 군용인데, 노래하고 춤도 추게 됐어.

1000637826.english: It's nice~ Seeing the Producer being motivated, they must be looking forward to it.
1000637826.korean: 좋잖아~ 프로듀서도 의욕적인 걸 보면 분명 기대하고 있을 거야.

1000637827.english: A song just for one person… that's really lucky.
1000637827.korean: 한 명만을 위한 노래라니... 진짜 팔자도 좋아.

1000637828.english: They're going to love it a lot.

1000637829.english: Well… at least one reaction is good.

1000637830.english: Here, I'll add a rap ad-lib here.

1000637831.english: …Don't beat around the bush, be honest! Yeah, this is it!
1000637831.korean: ...빙빙 돌지 말고 솔직하게 말해줘! 그래, 이거다!

1000637832.english: Ah, me too, me too. Can I change some lyrics?
1000637832.korean: 아, 나도나도. 가사 좀 바꿔도 돼?

1000637834.english: Here… is this called the bridge?

1000637835.english: I want to express my feelings like this~ I think it fits the melody better this way.
1000637835.korean: 이런 내 마음을 말할래~ 이렇게 하는 게 멜로디에 더 어울릴 것 같아.

1000637837.english: Of course, it should get more honest toward the end. It's a confession.
1000637837.korean: 당연히 뒤로 갈수록 솔직해져야지. 고백하는 건데.

1000637839.english: At first, speak a little indirectly, then be honest toward the end—that structure works best.
1000637839.korean: 앞에서는 조금 돌려서 말하다가, 뒤에서는 솔직하게 말하는 구성이 좋을 것 같아.

1000637840.english: Th-then I'll change the ending part like this.
1000637840.korean: 그, 그러면 엔딩 부분을... 이렇게 바꿀게.

1000637842.english: Alright, let's wrap up and practice singing.

1000637844.english: It's been a while since I've felt like this…

1000637845.english: Still, only that person will understand my heart.
1000637845.korean: 그래도 그녀석만은 내 마음을 알아 줄거야.

1000637850.english: You have six hours left before deployment, right?

1000637853.english: Damn, did someone beat me to it…!

1000637854.english: P/A-00 Griffon… even so, you can't talk to the commander like that…
1000637854.korean: 그리폰... 아무리 그래도 전대장한테 그렇게 막말을 하면...

1000637858.english: For now, tell P-49 Sleipnir too. We'll talk again when they come back.
1000637858.korean: 일단 슬레이프니르한테도 전해줘. 돌아오면 다시 이야기하자.

1000637859.english: It'll be fine. I'll do my best too.

1000637860.english: Don't worry about that. I've already adjusted everything.

1000637861.english: Good. Then from now on, everyone will call me Producer!
1000637861.korean: 좋아. 그러면 지금부터 나에 대한 호칭은 프로듀서로 통일한다!

1000637862.english: Alright, everyone, take a look at this.

1000637863.english: First, start with P-29 Lindwurm, P/A-00 Griffon, and P/A-8 Blackhound.
1000637863.korean: 일단 린티랑 그리폰, 블랙 하운드부터 받아.

1000637864.english: You can change clothes and come over now.

1000637865.english: I asked Audrey Dreamweaver, so yours will be ready soon too. Sorry about that.
1000637865.korean: 오드리한테 부탁해놨으니까 너희 것도 곧 완성될거야. 미안.

1000637867.english: If it's too much, Audrey Dreamweaver might not like it.

1000637869.english: First, I think we need to check your skills. P-49 Sleipnir?
1000637869.korean: 먼저 너희의 실력을 알아봐야 할 것 같아. 슬레이프니르?

1000637870.english: You said you had a song you practiced alone before, right?
1000637870.korean: 전에 혼자 연습할때 준비했던 곡이 있었다고 했지?

1000637871.english: Good. Let's complete that song and practice it.
1000637871.korean: 좋아. 일단 그 곡을 완성하고 연습해보자.

1000637872.english: Just this song. I also have things I need to prepare.
1000637872.korean: 이 곡만이야. 나도 준비해야 할 게 있으니까.

1000637877.english: It's fine. You came because of the outfit?
